product.name: Radiance Cordless Outdoor Shades for Porch, Patio & Windows - Waterproof PVC Blinds for Indoor & Outdoor - Roll-Up Patio Privacy Screen for Diffuse Sunlight - White - 48" W x 72" L - (3320146)
product.description: Upgrade your porch, patio, or windows with Radiance Cordless Outdoor Shades. These 48"W x 72"L White PVC Waterproof Blinds blend style and functionality to enhance your comfort and lifestyle. Tired of harsh sunlight ruining your outdoor haven? Radiance Outdoor Sun Shades diffuse intense rays, keeping your space cool and visually comfortable. Enjoy a pleasant ambiance without the glare. Crafted from durable 1/4 inch oval PVC, these USA-made blinds withstand the elements. Rain or shine, your areas remain stylish and functional. Their robust construction ensures long-lasting performance for both indoor and outdoor use. Add sophistication to any setting with Radiance blinds. These roll-up shades blend seamlessly with your decor while enhancing privacy, perfect for creating a cozy nook or stylish retreat. Offering full coverage and protection, these blinds are designed to fit perfectly, shielding your outdoor spaces from unwanted sunlight and prying eyes. Transform your space quickly with the user-friendly installation kit. These cord-free blinds are child-safe, eliminating choking hazards. Cleaning is a breeze – just use a dry cloth or vacuum attachment. Radiance stands out with its blend of functionality and style. These blinds don't just look good; they perform exceptionally well, providing excellent sunlight control, durability, and ease of use. Key Features: Material: PVC Vinyl, Dimensions: 48"W x 72"L, Color: White, Light Filtering: Diffuses sunlight for a cooler space, Privacy: Creates a comfortable outdoor living area, Waterproof: Ideal for outdoor patios or porches, Easy Installation: Installs in minutes with included hardware, Charming Aesthetic: Adds a natural touch to your space, Versatile: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, Made in the USA. Radiance Cordless Outdoor Shades offer the perfect solution for those seeking to enhance their living spaces. Whether you're looking to create a serene outdoor retreat or add a touch of elegance to your indoor areas.
features: LIGHT FILTERING - Outdoor window shades and PVC blinds diffuse sunlight, creating a cooler space.
PRIVACY - Build a comfortable outdoor patio space with our collection of outdoor shades and blinds.
WATERPROOF - Define your outdoor patio or porch with our waterproof shades and PVC blinds.
EASY INSTALLATION - Using the included materials, your new shade installs in minutes.
CHARMING - PVC outdoor blinds and patio shades add a natural touch to your outdoor living space.
